import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(s)
    let trimmed = string.trim(s)
    let parts = string.split_whitespace(trimmed)
    mut i = 0
    mut best = 0
    mut best_abs = 0
    mut found = false
    while i < parts.len()
      match parts.get(i)
      when Some(tok)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(n)
          mut a = n
          if a < 0
            a = -a
          end
          if not found
            best = n
            best_abs = a
            found = true
          else if a < best_abs
            best = n
            best_abs = a
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println("min_abs=#{best}")
  when None
    ()
  end
end
